nodes.context: Neapolitan Camorra clan operating in eastern suburbs of Naples, Ponticelli and Cercola.
Camorra organization; Umberto De Luca Bossa was a trusted member.
Camorra clan; Antonio De Luca Bossa started as a killer for them, later warred with them.
Camorra clan based in Pianura; allied with De Luca Bossa via Teresa De Luca Bossa.
Camorra clan; fought by the united forces of De Luca Bossa and Marfella clans.
Rival Camorra clan that disputed territory with De Luca Bossa clan.
Rival Camorra clan; warred with De Luca Bossa clan.
Powerful Camorra alliance; allied with De Luca Bossa clan under Teresa De Luca Bossa.
Camorra clan based in eastern Naples; allied with De Luca Bossa clan.
Camorra clan listed as ally in infobox.
Camorra clan listed as rival in infobox.
Camorra clan listed as rival in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: In the early 90s, Antonio became a trusted member of the Sarno clan, however, he decided to create his own clan, which ended in a bloody war between the then newly created clan and the Sarnos for the control of the territory.
edges.context: The De Luca Bossa clan fought a war with the Sarno clan over territory.

edges.evidence_quote: thanks to the relationship between Teresa De Luca Bossa, mother of Antonio, with Giuseppe Marfella, boss of the Marfella clan, based in Pianura, the forces of the two clans united in fighting the Lago clan.
edges.context: The De Luca Bossa and Marfella clans united to fight the Lago clan.

edges.evidence_quote: the forces of the two clans united in fighting the Lago clan.
edges.context: The De Luca Bossa and Marfella clans fought against the Lago clan.

edges.evidence_quote: In the years when Teresa De Luca Bossa was in command, the clan also made an alliance with the powerful Secondigliano Alliance.
edges.context: The De Luca Bossa clan allied with the Secondigliano Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: the war between the De Luca Bossa and the De Micco clans.
edges.context: The De Luca Bossa clan was at war with the De Micco clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Minichini was known to have a good relationship with Ciro Rinaldi, boss of the Rinaldi clan, also based in the eastern part of Naples, making an alliance between the two clans.
edges.context: The De Luca Bossa clan formed an alliance with the Rinaldi clan.

edges.evidence_quote: the clan gradually lost control of the territory, disputed by rival clans, such as the D'Amico clan (called Fraulella) and the De Micco clan (called Bodo).
edges.context: The D'Amico clan was a rival disputing territory with the De Luca Bossa clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Marfella clan, Rinaldi clan, Secondigliano Alliance, Aprea-Cuccaro clan
edges.context: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sarno clan (defunct), De Micco clan, Mazzarella clan, Mariano clan
edges.context: The Mazzarella clan is listed as a rival in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sarno clan (defunct), De Micco clan, Mazzarella clan, Mariano clan
edges.context: The Mariano clan is listed as a rival in the infobox.
